nasb.text: ‘Now if it is an animal of the kind which men can present as an offering to the Lord, any such that one gives to the Lord shall be holy.

esv.text: “If the vow is an animal that may be offered as an offering to the Lord, all of it that he gives to the Lord is holy.

cnv.text: 如果所許的是可以獻給耶和華為供物的牲畜，獻給耶和華的任何牲畜，都要分別為聖。

ccb.text: “如果有人许愿献牲畜给耶和华作供物，所献的牲畜就会成为圣物。
